The Luxury Salon

Hair Extension Specialist

Welcome to Luxury Salon, where beauty meets expertise. Our salon offers a relaxing and modern space designed to pamper you from the moment you walk in. Whether you're looking for a fresh haircut, vibrant color, sleek blowout, or nourishing hair treatment, our talented team of stylists is here to bring your vision to life. We specialize in personalized hair care, the latest styling trends, and exceptional customer service. At Luxury salon, your hair isn’t just styled—it’s transformed."

Our Services

Skin & Facial Services

Regular Clean-up Fruit Facial Gold/Platinum Facial Anti-aging Facial De-tan Facial

Hair Coloring

Global Coloring Highlights/Lowlights Root Touch-up Fashion Colors & Ombre/Balayage

Hair Gloss & Shine Treatments

Semi-permanent treatments to add richness, shine, and a healthy glow to dull hair.

Special Occasion Styling

Elegant updos, curls, and custom looks for weddings, parties, and events.

Luxury Hair Spa & Scalp Therapy

Deep-conditioning treatments, oil massages, and scalp detoxes for relaxation and rejuvenation.

Precision Haircuts & Styling

Custom cuts and blowouts tailored to face shape, hair texture, and personal style.
